message:
docs(agents): add beads workflow integration guide

Append comprehensive beads (beads_viewer) workflow documentation to AGENTS.md.
This provides AI agents with essential commands and patterns for issue tracking
integration in this project.

## Commands Reference

### Issue Discovery
- `bd ready` - Show issues ready to work (no blockers)
- `bd list --status=open` - All open issues
- `bd show <id>` - Full issue details with dependencies

### Issue Management
- `bd create --title="..." --type=task --priority=2` - Create new issue
- `bd update <id> --status=in_progress` - Claim work
- `bd close <id>` - Mark complete
- `bd close <id1> <id2>` - Close multiple at once (efficient)
- `bd sync` - Commit and push beads changes

### Dependencies
- `bd dep add <issue> <depends-on>` - Add blocking relationship
- `bd blocked` - Show blocked issues

## Workflow Pattern

1. **Start**: `bd ready` to find actionable work
2. **Claim**: `bd update <id> --status=in_progress`
3. **Work**: Implement the task
4. **Complete**: `bd close <id>`
5. **Sync**: Always `bd sync` at session end

## Session Close Checklist

Mandatory before ending any session:
1. git status (check changes)
2. git add <files> (stage code)
3. bd sync (commit beads)
4. git commit -m "..." (commit code)
5. bd sync (any new beads changes)
6. git push (push to remote)

## Key Concepts

- **Priority**: P0-P4 (use numbers, not "high"/"medium"/"low")
- **Types**: task, bug, feature, epic, question, docs
- **Dependencies**: `bd dep add` creates blocking relationships
- **Ready**: `bd ready` filters to only unblocked, actionable issues

This documentation is auto-generated by beads setup hooks (marker:
bv-agent-instructions-v1) but manually committed to ensure version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -350,4 +350,67 @@ ru list --paths            # Repo paths (stdout)
 
 **Critical:**
 - Never create worktrees/clones in projects dir → use `/tmp/`
-- Never parse human output → use `--json`
\ No newline at end of file
+- Never parse human output → use `--json`
+
+<!-- bv-agent-instructions-v1 -->
+
+---
+
+## Beads Workflow Integration
+
+This project uses [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) for issue tracking. Issues are stored in `.beads/` and tracked in git.
+
+### Essential Commands
+
+```bash
+# View issues (launches TUI - avoid in automated sessions)
+bv
+
+# CLI commands for agents (use these instead)
+bd ready              # Show issues ready to work (no blockers)
+bd list --status=open # All open issues
+bd show <id>          # Full issue details with dependencies
+bd create --title="..." --type=task --priority=2
+bd update <id> --status=in_progress
+bd close <id> --reason="Completed"
+bd close <id1> <id2>  # Close multiple issues at once
+bd sync               # Commit and push changes
+```
+
+### Workflow Pattern
+
+1. **Start**: Run `bd ready` to find actionable work
+2. **Claim**: Use `bd update <id> --status=in_progress`
+3. **Work**: Implement the task
+4. **Complete**: Use `bd close <id>`
+5. **Sync**: Always run `bd sync` at session end
+
+### Key Concepts
+
+- **Dependencies**: Issues can block other issues. `bd ready` shows only unblocked work.
+- **Priority**: P0=critical, P1=high, P2=medium, P3=low, P4=backlog (use numbers, not words)
+- **Types**: task, bug, feature, epic, question, docs
+- **Blocking**: `bd dep add <issue> <depends-on>` to add dependencies
+
+### Session Protocol
+
+**Before ending any session, run this checklist:**
+
+```bash
+git status              # Check what changed
+git add <files>         # Stage code changes
+bd sync                 # Commit beads changes
+git commit -m "..."     # Commit code
+bd sync                 # Commit any new beads changes
+git push                # Push to remote
+```
+
+### Best Practices
+
+- Check `bd ready` at session start to find available work
+- Update status as you work (in_progress → closed)
+- Create new issues with `bd create` when you discover tasks
+- Use descriptive titles and set appropriate priority/type
+- Always `bd sync` before ending session
+
+<!-- end-bv-agent-instructions -->
